posts.title: Little moments
posts.excerpt: Rushing through the streets, day after day, week after week, month after month.

posts.title: Welcome
posts.excerpt: Every journal needs a first entry, so here's mine. Consider this the door swinging open.

posts.title: God Doesn't Need Your Worship
posts.excerpt: God doesn't need your worship. The real question is what you're becoming through what you worship.
